title: Alliance masternav
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The '''Alliance masternav''' was a computer system used to track orbital patterns of planets within known [[Star system/Legends|star systems]]. It needed to be constantly updated with the latest software to stay up-to-date with [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] changes.

{{Tech-stub}}

==Appearances==
*''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' {{1st}}
